auth.label: Account Number
auth.description: The OKSign account number used as the first segment of x-oksign-authorization. Create or manage API access from the OKSign API Console after signing in: https://www.oksign.be/public/api/.

extraFields.label: Authorization Token
extraFields.description: The authorization token defined in your OKSign account and used as the second segment of x-oksign-authorization.

extraFields.label: Organizational Token
extraFields.description: The organizational token defined in your OKSign account and used as the third segment of x-oksign-authorization.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Get OKSign credits balance, expiry, and account storage details.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

accountSize.description: The current storage usage in bytes.

maxAccountSize.description: The maximum storage capacity in bytes.

paid.description: Whether the account is on a paid plan.

subscription.description: The current OKSign subscription tier code.

validUntil.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the credit balance expires.

outputSchema.description: Credits and storage summary returned by OKSign.

actions.name: get_document_metadata
actions.description: Get OKSign metadata v2 for a signed document by signed_docid.

docId.description: The source_docid or signed_docid to send as x-oksign-docid.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for an OKSign document identifier lookup.

filename.description: The filename of the signed document.

size.description: The human-readable signed document size returned by OKSign.

nbrOfSigaturesRequired.description: The number of required signatures defined on the source document.

nbrOfSigaturesValid.description: The number of signatures already placed on the signed document.

inputtype.description: The field type defined in the source form descriptor.

name.description: The field name defined in the source form descriptor.

pagenbr.description: The zero-based page number that contains the field.

anyOf.description: The completed value for a non-signature field.
Signature metadata object returned for a completed CanvasSIG field.

value.description: The completed field value or signature metadata object returned by OKSign.

metadata.description: Completion metadata for the field when the field has been completed.

items.description: One field entry from the OKSign metadata v2 response.

fields.description: The field definitions and completion metadata.

mobile.description: The signer mobile number as stored in OKSign, possibly empty.

actingas.description: The signer role or qualification, possibly empty.

id.description: The immutable signer identifier used in form descriptors.

items.description: One signer reference returned by OKSign metadata v2.

signersinfo.description: The signer information array defined on the source document.

document.description: The signed document metadata payload returned by OKSign metadata v2.

outputSchema.description: Metadata v2 response wrapper returned by OKSign.

actions.name: get_linked_document
actions.description: Resolve the corresponding source_docid and signed_docid pair for an OKSign document identifier.

docId.description: The source_docid or signed_docid to send as x-oksign-docid.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for an OKSign document identifier lookup.

source_docid.description: The source document identifier tied to the lookup result.

signed_docid.description: The signed document identifier when a signed copy exists for the source document.

ts.description: The timestamp when the document was first signed or uploaded when no signed copy exists yet.

anyOf.description: Linked source and signed document identifiers returned by OKSign.

outputSchema.description: Linked document lookup response wrapper returned by OKSign.

actions.name: list_active_documents
actions.description: List active OKSign documents visible in the current account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

createdate.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

creator.description: The email address or identifier of the document creator.

docid.description: The source document identifier returned by OKSign.

filename.description: The filename of the active document.

nbrOfSigaturesRequired.description: The number of signatures required by the document workflow.

nbrOfSigaturesValid.description: The number of valid signatures currently placed on the document.

orgtoken.description: The organizational token used when the document was uploaded via the API.

reusable.description: Whether the document is marked as reusable.

signed_docid.description: The signed document identifier when the document has a signed copy.

status.description: The OKSign numeric status code for the document.

viaapi.description: Whether the document was uploaded via the REST API.

items.description: Summary fields returned for one active OKSign document.

documents.description: The active documents visible in the account.

outputSchema.description: Active document list returned by OKSign.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List the users configured in the current OKSign account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

actingas.description: The user role or qualification as stored in OKSign.

language.description: The preferred language code configured for the user.

mobile.description: The user mobile number, possibly empty.

role.description: The account role assigned to the user.

signerid.description: The immutable signer identifier assigned to the user.

status.description: The current account status for the user.

ts.description: The timestamp when the user was created or updated.

items.description: One user returned by the OKSign users endpoint.

users.description: The users configured in the OKSign account.
